## Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of the changes you are proposing. Include the rationale for adding or modifying the resource.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New resource addition (tool, article, framework)
- [ ] Broken link correction
- [ ] Typo correction or formatting improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md document.
- [ ] I have searched the repository to ensure this resource is not a duplicate.
- [ ] The resource is categorized in the correct directory.
- [ ] The description is objective, concise, and written in English.
- [ ] The link is functional and points to a reputable source.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or relevant information about the pull request here.
